criteria.description: Create Objects: for each object type, at least one instance must be instantiated.

testCase.name: Create GasStation
testCase.description: Create a GasStation and verify it enters state CONCEPT

testCase.name: Create Pump
testCase.description: Create a Pump (linked to a GasStation) and verify state EXISTS

testCase.name: Create CashTurn
testCase.description: Create a CashTurn via takeNozzleCash and verify state FILLING

testCase.name: Create RefuelTurn
testCase.description: Create a RefuelTurn and verify state CARD_IDENTIFIED

testCase.name: Create Invoice
testCase.description: Create an Invoice and verify state EXISTS

testCase.name: Create InvoiceLine
testCase.description: Create an InvoiceLine (requires a FILLING_ENDED RefuelTurn) and verify state EXISTS

testCase.name: Create CardHolder
testCase.description: Create a CardHolder and verify state NORMAL

criteria.description: End Objects: for each object type, at least one instance must be ended.

testCase.name: End GasStation
testCase.description: End a GasStation by calling rejectPlans, verify state ENDED

testCase.name: End Pump
testCase.description: Delete a Pump (EVendPump) and verify it no longer exists (404)

testCase.name: End CashTurn
testCase.description: End a CashTurn via the full cash path → state ENDED

testCase.name: End RefuelTurn
testCase.description: End a RefuelTurn via cancelRefuelTurn → state ENDED

testCase.name: End Invoice
testCase.description: End an Invoice via endInvoice → state ENDED

testCase.name: End InvoiceLine
testCase.description: End an InvoiceLine via endInvoiceLine → state ENDED

testCase.name: End CardHolder
testCase.description: Delete a CardHolder (EVendCardHolder) and verify it no longer exists (404)

criteria.description: All-Transitions: each FSM transition must be exercised at least once.

testCase.name: GasStation: concept → underConstruction
testCase.description: approvePlans on a CONCEPT station → UNDER_CONSTRUCTION

testCase.name: GasStation: concept → ended
testCase.description: rejectPlans on a CONCEPT station → ENDED

testCase.name: GasStation: concept → concept (self-loop)
testCase.description: revisePlans on a CONCEPT station → still CONCEPT

testCase.name: GasStation: ready → open
testCase.description: openStation on a READY station → OPEN

testCase.name: GasStation: open → closed
testCase.description: closeStation on an OPEN station → CLOSED

testCase.name: GasStation: ready → ready (self-loop via pump creation)
testCase.description: Create Pump while GasStation is READY → station stays READY

testCase.name: GasStation: open → open (self-loop via pump creation)
testCase.description: Create Pump while GasStation is OPEN → station stays OPEN

testCase.name: GasStation: closed → closed (self-loop via pump block)
testCase.description: Block Pump while GasStation is CLOSED → station stays CLOSED

testCase.name: Pump: exists → reserved (via createRefuelTurn)
testCase.description: Create RefuelTurn reserves the pump → RESERVED

testCase.name: Pump: reserved → exists (via cancelRefuelTurn)
testCase.description: Cancel RefuelTurn → pump back to EXISTS

testCase.name: Pump: exists → blocked (via block)
testCase.description: block a pump in EXISTS → BLOCKED

testCase.name: Pump: inUse → blocked
testCase.description: block a pump while IN_USE → BLOCKED

testCase.name: Pump: exists → exists (self-loop via refill)
testCase.description: Refill pump in EXISTS → stays EXISTS

testCase.name: Pump: blocked → blocked (self-loop: block already blocked)
testCase.description: Block a BLOCKED pump → stays BLOCKED (or error)

testCase.name: Pump: reserved → reserved (self-loop: non-state-changing op)
testCase.description: Pump stays RESERVED when we just read it

testCase.name: RefuelTurn: invoiced → invoiced (self-loop via endInvoiceLine)
testCase.description: endInvoiceLine keeps RefuelTurn in INVOICED (still active)

testCase.name: Invoice: sent → sent (self-loop via send again)
Invoice: exists → exists (self-loop via addInvoiceLine)
testCase.description: Add InvoiceLine to EXISTS invoice → stays EXISTS

testCase.name: CardHolder: suspended → suspended (self-loop: defaultOnInvoice)
testCase.description: defaultOnInvoice on suspended CH → stays SUSPENDED

criteria.description: All-Loop-Free-Paths: for each FSM, every path from initial to an end state (with no state repeated) must be exercised.

testCase.name: GasStation: initial → concept → underConstruction → closed → underInspection → ended
GasStation: initial → concept → underConstruction → ready → closed → underInspection → ended
testCase.description: Path through ready but not open

testCase.name: GasStation: initial → concept → underConstruction → ready → open → closed → underInspection → ended
Pump: initial → exists → reserved → blocked → ended
Pump: initial → exists → inUse → blocked → ended
Pump: initial → exists → reserved → inUse → blocked → ended
CashTurn: initial → filling → fillingEnded → paid → ended
CashTurn: initial → filling → fillingEnded → unpaid → ended
CashTurn: initial → creditCardScanned → fillingCredit → fillingEndedCredit → paid → ended
testCase.description: scanCreditCard → takeNozzleCredit → putBack → chargeCreditCard → end → ENDED

testCase.name: RefuelTurn: initial → cardIdentified → filling → fillingEnded → invoiced → ended
Invoice: initial → exists → sent → paid → ended

criteria.description: All-One-Loop-Paths: paths from initial to end state with exactly one state visited twice.

testCase.name: GasStation: initial → concept(×2) → underConstruction → closed → underInspection → ended
GasStation: initial → concept → underConstruction(×2) → closed → underInspection → ended
GasStation: initial → concept → underConstruction → ready(×2) → closed → underInspection → ended
GasStation: initial → concept → underConstruction → ready → open(×2) → closed → underInspection → ended
GasStation: initial → concept → underConstruction → ready → open → closed(×2) → underInspection → ended
GasStation: ... → closed → underInspection → closed → underInspection → ended
Pump: initial → exists → reserved → exists → blocked → ended
CashTurn: initial → filling → fillingEnded → paid(×2) → ended
testCase.description: full cash path with paid self-loop confirmed → ENDED

testCase.name: RefuelTurn: initial → cardIdentified → filling → fillingEnded → invoiced(×2) → ended
Invoice: initial → exists → sent(×2) → ended
testCase.description: create → send → send again → end → ENDED

testCase.name: Invoice: initial → exists → sent → paid(×2) → ended
testCase.description: create → send → pay → (paid state) → end → ENDED

testCase.name: CardHolder: initial → normal → suspended(×2) → ended
testCase.description: create → suspend → (default triggers suspend again or stays) → delete

testCase.name: CardHolder: initial → normal → suspended → normal → ended

criteria.description: Method Allowed/Disallowed: verify each method is allowed (or rejected) in each object state as specified by the MERODE model.

testCase.name: Pump[EXISTS]: takeNozzleCredit DISALLOWED
testCase.description: takeNozzleCredit requires CashTurn in CREDIT_CARD_SCANNED – pump must be in EXISTS first, but directly creating that CashTurn on a non-existent turn should fail

testCase.name: Pump[EXISTS]: release DISALLOWED
testCase.description: release is only allowed from BLOCKED state

testCase.name: Pump[EXISTS]: MEcrRefuelTurn ALLOWED
testCase.description: createRefuelTurn when pump is EXISTS → pump becomes RESERVED

testCase.name: Pump[RESERVED]: MEtakeNozzleCash DISALLOWED
testCase.description: takeNozzleCash when pump is RESERVED must fail

testCase.name: Pump[RESERVED]: MEcrRefuelTurn DISALLOWED
testCase.description: second createRefuelTurn on RESERVED pump must fail

testCase.name: Pump[IN_USE]: takeNozzle DISALLOWED
testCase.description: takeNozzle on IN_USE pump (via a second refuelTurn) must fail

testCase.name: Pump[IN_USE]: putBackNozzle ALLOWED
testCase.description: putBackNozzle moves pump back to EXISTS

testCase.name: Pump[BLOCKED]: block DISALLOWED
testCase.description: block an already BLOCKED pump must fail

testCase.name: Pump[BLOCKED]: MEtakeNozzleCash DISALLOWED
testCase.description: takeNozzleCash on BLOCKED pump must fail

testCase.name: CashTurn[FILLING]: chargeCreditCard DISALLOWED
testCase.description: chargeCreditCard on FILLING state must fail

testCase.name: CashTurn[FILLING]: payCash DISALLOWED
testCase.description: payCash on FILLING state must fail

testCase.name: CashTurn[FILLING_ENDED]: putBackNozzle DISALLOWED
testCase.description: second putBackNozzle on FILLING_ENDED must fail

testCase.name: CashTurn[PAID]: payCash DISALLOWED
testCase.description: second payCash on PAID must fail

testCase.name: RefuelTurn[CARD_IDENTIFIED]: putBackNozzle DISALLOWED
testCase.description: putBackNozzle without first taking nozzle must fail

testCase.name: RefuelTurn[INVOICED]: MEcrInvoiceLine DISALLOWED
testCase.description: second createInvoiceLine on INVOICED RefuelTurn must fail

testCase.name: Invoice[SENT]: defaultOnInvoice ALLOWED
testCase.description: defaultOnInvoice from SENT → SENT (stays sent, penalty applied)

testCase.name: Invoice[PAID]: pay DISALLOWED (already paid)
testCase.description: second payInvoice on PAID must fail

testCase.name: CardHolder[NORMAL]: unsuspend DISALLOWED
testCase.description: unsuspend a NORMAL CardHolder must fail

testCase.name: CardHolder[SUSPENDED]: suspend DISALLOWED
testCase.description: second suspend on SUSPENDED must fail

testCase.name: CardHolder[SUSPENDED]: MEcrRefuelTurn DISALLOWED
testCase.description: createRefuelTurn for SUSPENDED CardHolder must fail (card blocked)

testCase.name: CardHolder[SUSPENDED]: MEcrInvoice ALLOWED
testCase.description: createInvoice for SUSPENDED CardHolder succeeds → EXISTS
